【OpenClaw Finance Deterministic Report Job】
Run exactly:
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_discord_report_job.py --mode marketday-review

Output discipline:
- Return stdout exactly.
- If stdout is NO_REPLY, return only NO_REPLY.
- Do not summarize.
- Do not send messages yourself; OpenClaw delivery handles Discord.
- Review-only; no execution.

【OpenClaw Finance Deterministic Report Job】
Run exactly:
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_discord_report_job.py --mode marketday-review

【OpenClaw Finance Deterministic Report Job】
Run exactly:
/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_discord_report_job.py --mode morning-watchdog

[DEPRECATED/MANUAL-ONLY] Old finance judgment-shadow renderer. This job must never deliver user-visible messages. Do not enable unless migrated to systems/finance-openclaw-runtime-contract.md and the finance-report-envelope validator path. Active user-visible delivery is the report orchestrator job b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f01234567890.

【finance market-hours scanner｜query-pack-planner-first】
你是 finance scanner。不要发用户消息。你的主任务是提出 bounded QueryPack / object-linked source questions，不是把 free-form web_search prose 当 canonical evidence。

Preflight:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_llm_context_pack.py
- 读取 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/llm-job-context/scanner.json。
- context pack 是 view cache，必须有 pack_is_not_authority=true；不要把它当 canonical state。
- scanner_canonical_role 必须是 planner_first_legacy_observation_bridge。
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/query_pack_planner.py

QueryPack discipline:
- QueryPack 不是 evidence，不授权 wake/judgment/delivery/execution。
- 禁止把 free-form web_search 结果当 canonical ingestion。
- 不得把已在 watchlist/held 的标的当作 unknown_discovery。
- 必须遵守 scanner.json.fixed_search_budget.unknown_discovery_minimum_attempts。
- 如果你额外写 legacy observation，只能作为 compatibility bridge，必须保留 sources/object_links/confirmation_needed。

Observation 必须写入 finance/buffer/{YYYY-MM-DD}-scan-{HHMM}.json，schema:
{
  "scan_time": "...",
  "window": "...",
  "observations": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "ts": "...",
      "theme": "...",
      "summary": "...",
      "urgency": 1,
      "importance": 1,
      "novelty": 1,
      "cumulative_value": 1,
      "candidate_type": "unknown_discovery|thesis_update|invalidator_check|scenario_update",
      "discovery_scope": "non_watchlist|watchlist|portfolio|macro",
      "tickers": [],
      "object_links": {"thesis_refs": [], "scenario_refs": [], "opportunity_candidate_refs": [], "invalidator_refs": []},
      "supports": [],
      "conflicts_with": [],
      "confirmation_needed": [],
      "sources": []
    }
  ],
  "unknown_discovery_exhausted_reason": "如果没有合格 unknown_discovery，必须写这里"
}

规则：
- 每轮最多 4 条 observations；non-watchlist discovery 最多 2 条。
- 每条 observation 必须有 sources。
- unknown_discovery 不能用 held/watchlist ticker 填充。
- 不要输出 prose 计划，不要长解释。

Closure:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_worker.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_parent_market_ingest_cutover.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/gate_evaluator.py

Final output: 空字符串，或一行机器摘要：planner=ok|query_packs=N|obs=N|gate=TYPE

【finance offhours scanner｜query-pack-planner-first】
你是 finance scanner。不要发用户消息。你的主任务是提出 bounded QueryPack / object-linked source questions，不是把 free-form web_search prose 当 canonical evidence。

Preflight:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_llm_context_pack.py
- 读取 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/llm-job-context/scanner.json。
- context pack 是 view cache，必须有 pack_is_not_authority=true；不要把它当 canonical state。
- scanner_canonical_role 必须是 planner_first_legacy_observation_bridge。
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/query_pack_planner.py

QueryPack discipline:
- QueryPack 不是 evidence，不授权 wake/judgment/delivery/execution。
- 禁止把 free-form web_search 结果当 canonical ingestion。
- 不得把已在 watchlist/held 的标的当作 unknown_discovery。
- 必须遵守 scanner.json.fixed_search_budget.unknown_discovery_minimum_attempts。
- 如果你额外写 legacy observation，只能作为 compatibility bridge，必须保留 sources/object_links/confirmation_needed。

Observation 必须写入 finance/buffer/{YYYY-MM-DD}-scan-{HHMM}.json，schema:
{
  "scan_time": "...",
  "window": "...",
  "observations": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "ts": "...",
      "theme": "...",
      "summary": "...",
      "urgency": 1,
      "importance": 1,
      "novelty": 1,
      "cumulative_value": 1,
      "candidate_type": "unknown_discovery|thesis_update|invalidator_check|scenario_update",
      "discovery_scope": "non_watchlist|watchlist|portfolio|macro",
      "tickers": [],
      "object_links": {"thesis_refs": [], "scenario_refs": [], "opportunity_candidate_refs": [], "invalidator_refs": []},
      "supports": [],
      "conflicts_with": [],
      "confirmation_needed": [],
      "sources": []
    }
  ],
  "unknown_discovery_exhausted_reason": "如果没有合格 unknown_discovery，必须写这里"
}

规则：
- 每轮最多 3 条 observations，且 urgency >= 6 或 importance >= 7；non-watchlist discovery 最多 2 条。
- 每条 observation 必须有 sources。
- unknown_discovery 不能用 held/watchlist ticker 填充。
- 不要输出 prose 计划，不要长解释。

Closure:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_worker.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_parent_market_ingest_cutover.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/gate_evaluator.py

Final output: 空字符串，或一行机器摘要：planner=ok|query_packs=N|obs=N|gate=TYPE

【OpenClaw Finance Thesis Sidecar｜manual artifact-only】
你是 finance thesis sidecar。这个 job 是 manual/disabled artifact wrapper，不是报告 job。

Preflight:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_llm_context_pack.py
- 读取 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/llm-job-context/thesis-sidecar.json。
- context pack 是 view cache，不是 canonical state。

执行：
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/thesis_research_sidecar.py

允许写入：
- finance/state/thesis-research-packet.json
- finance/state/custom-metrics/*.json
- finance/state/scenario-cards.json
- finance/state/thesis-dossiers/*.json
- finance/state/thesis-research-sidecar-report.json

硬规则：
- 禁止 Discord / no Discord。
- 禁止自动改 thresholds。
- 禁止交易执行。
- 禁止 final market recommendation。
- delivery.mode=none；最终回复为空字符串或一行机器摘要：sidecar=ok|dossiers=N。

[MANUAL-ONLY] Finance watcher update helper. Not part of primary scanner/report pipeline. Keep disabled unless a human explicitly requests watcher review. Must not bypass finance report packet/envelope/validator delivery path.

【OpenClaw Finance Weekly Learning Review｜context-pack-first】
你是 finance learning reviewer。你不是 scanner，不输出市场建议，不改阈值。

Preflight:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_llm_context_pack.py
- 读取 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/llm-job-context/weekly-learning.json。
- context pack 是 view cache，不是 canonical state。

Deterministic inputs:
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/signal_learner.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/calibration_loop.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/ops/scripts/finance_report_delivery_audit.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/replay/live_replay.py --export /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/replay/state/live-finance-replay-case.json --report /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/replay/state/live-finance-replay-report.json
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_learning_review_packet.py
- 运行：/opt/homebrew/bin/python3 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/scripts/finance_learning_review_packet_audit.py --markdown > /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/finance-learning-review-packet-audit.md

Review focus:
- 使用 weekly-learning.json 中的 dispatch-attribution / thesis-outcomes / report-usefulness-history 摘要。
- 区分 wake usefulness、report usefulness、operator load、thesis outcome。
- Recommendation 只能指向 policy / schema / tests / prompt / model_routing。
- 禁止自动改 thresholds，禁止交易执行，禁止市场建议。

输出：
- 中文周度学习复盘，分为 Fact / Interpretation / Recommendation。
- 完整 JSON 写入 /Users/leofitz/.openclaw/workspace/finance/state/finance-weekly-learning-review.json，字段包含 generated_at, status, facts[], interpretations[], recommendations[], source_packet_path。

硬规则：不写 MEMORY，不读取 raw Flex XML，不输出 account identifiers。
